response:
I am a dedicated and organized individual with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing strong knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a strong team spirit, and a commitment to continuous learning and development. I am reliable, proactive, and adept at managing multiple tasks, including supervision, transcription, and customer relationship management. I consistently exceed productivity expectations to contribute to the success of the organization.  

I have experience as a medical scribe and editor, working with platforms like eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I have also served as a supervisor and customer relationship executive, ensuring high-quality output and excellent service in the glass industry. My role as a quality analyst and controller has enhanced my ability to monitor and improve the accuracy and efficiency of medical transcription.  

I am a passionate and adaptable professional with a strong leadership background, proficient in Microsoft Office, electronic health records, and email. I am eager to bring my skills and experience to a new opportunity in the medical transcription field.  

I am an Indian national with an On Visit Visa, and I am committed to contributing to the organization with my dedication, expertise, and positive attitude.
